subject: English
chapter: The Case of the Fifth Word

activities_projects.title: Advanced Anagram Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Develop critical thinking and word-analysis skills through complex anagram puzzles
steps: Analyse the crossword clues provided as anagrams
Break the letters into smaller combinations to find possible words
Identify the correct words related to the story context
Complete the crossword and explain your reasoning for each answer
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary, reasoning, and analytical thinking
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of answers and explanation of reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Contextual Meaning Analysis of 'Case'
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate how contextual clues change the meaning of a word
steps: Read the sentences containing the word 'case'
Determine the meaning based on context
Write a short explanation for each chosen meaning
Create one additional sentence using 'case' with a different meaning
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop deeper understanding of contextual vocabulary
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of meaning and quality of explanations (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Evaluation of Encyclopedia Brown
activities_projects.objective: Critically analyse the intelligence and behaviour of the main character
steps: Identify key actions taken by Encyclopedia Brown in the story
Analyse how his thinking helped solve the mystery
Compare his reasoning with how a police detective might solve a case
Write a short character evaluation paragraph
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical reading and character evaluation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Fact vs Opinion Justification
activities_projects.objective: Strengthen critical thinking by analysing facts and opinions
steps: Identify which statements are facts and which are opinions
Provide evidence from the text to support your choice
Discuss how opinions can influence interpretation of events
Present your findings in a short written explanation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve reasoning and evidence-based thinking
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct classification and textual justification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Cryptic Code Decoding
activities_projects.objective: Interpret coded clues and identify hidden meanings
steps: Study the coded message 'Nom Utes Sweden Hurts'
Identify the pattern connecting these words to days of the week
Determine the missing fifth word
Explain how this clue revealed the hiding place of the jewellery
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students strengthen logical reasoning and problem-solving skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of decoding and explanation of logic (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Phrasal Verb Application and Creation
activities_projects.objective: Analyse and apply phrasal verbs in different contexts
steps: Match phrasal verbs from the story with their meanings
Use each phrasal verb in a new sentence related to detective stories
Identify how phrasal verbs change meaning depending on context
Share your sentences with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance vocabulary and contextual language usage
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct usage and creativity in sentence formation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Homophone and Word Pair Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the difference between confusing word pairs
steps: Identify the correct word to complete each sentence
Explain the meaning of both words in each pair
Create one original sentence using each word
Discuss how incorrect word usage can change meaning
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary precision and language awareness
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct answers and explanation of differences (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Logical Puzzle Interpretation
activities_projects.objective: Develop analytical thinking through visual puzzle interpretation
steps: Observe the puzzle diagrams carefully
Interpret the hidden meaning behind each puzzle
Write the correct phrase represented by each puzzle
Explain the reasoning behind your answer
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance observation, reasoning, and interpretation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct answers with logical explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Complex Reported Speech Conversion
activities_projects.objective: Apply advanced grammar rules for reported speech
steps: Read the given direct speech sentences
Identify reporting verbs and question types
Convert them into indirect speech with correct tense and pronoun changes
Rewrite the sentences in a narrative paragraph
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students strengthen grammar and sentence transformation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of grammar and sentence structure (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Mystery Story Critical Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Encourage critical thinking about mystery stories
steps: Form discussion groups
Analyse what elements make a mystery story effective
Discuss the role of clues, logic, and suspense in the story
Present conclusions and compare with other mystery stories
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical discussion and reasoning skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of ideas, reasoning, and participation (10 marks)
